persona.internal_archetype: string — e.g. masked_melancholy (layer 2, never shown to user)

copy.eyebrow: string — small label above persona name, e.g. 'This week you're'
copy.persona_label: string — primary identity name, e.g. 'Arpit Bala Core'
copy.aka: string | null — cultural alias if different from archetype label
copy.subtitle: string — 1-2 line descriptor, e.g. 'Makes everyone laugh. Posts memes. Sends reels.'
copy.body: string — 2-3 line copy that lands the emotional truth beneath the persona
copy.card_copy: string — the closing punch line or signature line of this card
copy.tone: enum: funny | tender | roast | reflective | hype

visual.color_token: string — persona's assigned colour from palette e.g. 'coral' | 'purple' | 'teal'
visual.icon_glyph: string — single emoji or icon name representing this persona
visual.illustration_key: string | null — key for persona illustration asset if exists

symptoms.enabled: boolean — whether to show symptom list
symptoms.label: string — e.g. 'Symptoms include'
items: string — short symptom line e.g. 'Replaying old conversations'

secondary_persona.enabled: boolean — show if user scored high on 2 personas

streak.enabled: boolean — true if user has been this persona ≥2 consecutive periods

metadata.based_on_plays: integer — total play events that fed this card
